news.title: WoW: Midnight's hardcore raiders are on a gold treadmill, with a first-time clear of Mythic Midnight Falls costing around 87,750 gold in repairs alone
news.titleEN: WoW: Midnight's hardcore raiders are on a gold treadmill, with a first-time clear of Mythic Midnight Falls costing around 87,750 gold in repairs alone
news.desc: And that's before consumables, which ramps that bill up to 340,692 if you're going full tryhard.
news.descEN: And that's before consumables, which ramps that bill up to 340,692 if you're going full tryhard.
